steps.title: Identify the key signal in the claim
steps.content: The claim asks for mixed feelings — the narrator simultaneously holding positive and negative emotions about her surroundings.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: C expresses “quite fond of the big room” alongside disgust for “that horrid paper” — both positive and negative feelings about her surroundings in a single statement. A and D offer only negative descriptions of the wallpaper; B describes a visual shift under moonlight with no emotional conflict. This matches choice C — C is correct.
